title: Thales
meta: Guthman Award · Georgia Tech 2024 · NIME 2023 · Ars Electronica 2023

content.value: Two wireless controllers interacting through tangible magnetic fields. Named after Thales of Miletus, who described magnets as "having a soul".
Uses RAVE trained on magnet sounds. Build your own on GitHub.

_comment_paper: To link a research paper, replace null with: {"title": "Paper Title", "url": "papers/filename.pdf"}
_comment_links: To add external links, add objects like: {"label": "GitHub", "url": "https://..."}
